speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ajeeb si kampann
text: Aaj jab unhone mere accent ka mazak udaya, toh mere poore sharir mein ek ajeeb si kampann hone lagi aur peeth ka dard itna badh gaya ki khade hona mushkil hai. Saas kehti hain ki ye sab mera 'natak' hai kaam se bachne ke liye, par ye jo nasein phat rahi hain wo unhe kaise dikhau? Doctor bhi kehta hai sab normal hai, par meri ye thakan aur badan ka tootna khatam hi nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact body phrase as an invitation to elaborate without judgment.
text: Sun ke lag raha hai ki poore sharir ki is ajeeb si kampann aur badan ke tootne ko akele sehna behad mushkil ho raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, aur ghar mein choti se choti baat par apmaan ka bojh mere upar daal diya jata hai. Meri nasein dard se aur phatne lagti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of being blamed within the family.
text: Parivaar ke andar jab apni takleef ko samjhane ki jagah nahi milti, toh akelepan ka bojh aur bhi bhari ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ajeeb si kampann
text: Bilkul, aur doctor ke test mein bhi sab normal aaya toh kisi ko vishwas hi nahi hota. Peeth ka dard din ba din sirf bhari ho raha hai aur ye ajeeb si kampann badhti ja rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged duration of enduring this pain.
text: Itne dino se lagatar bina kisi thos madad ke aap is takleef aur thakan ko apne andar chhipaye hui hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Main sach mein bahut thak gayi hoon. Subah se lekar raat tak ghar ka saara kaam karna padta hai, tab jakar unhe shanti milti hai, par mere sharir ko aaram nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on her described physical burden to gently probe deeper emotions.
text: Aap jab din bhar akele itna kaam karti hain aur sharir ki takleef badhti jati hai, toh us waqt man hi man mein kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Bas yehi sochte rehti hoon ki agar main aaj bistar pakad lungi toh is ghar aur in bacchon ko kaun dekhega. Par is thakan ke chalte lagta hai meri saans nikal jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of her body giving up on her family.
text: Ye darr andar hi andar satata rehta hai ki agar sharir ne puri tarah saath chhod diya toh parivar ki un sabhi zaruraton ka kya hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, aur ab apne is dard ke baare mein kisi se kehne mein bhi sharam aati hai, bas chupchap ek kone mein apne aansu peeti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying shame and fear of judgment associated with asking for help.
text: Aisa mehsus hota hoga jaise haq se madad maangne mein bhi sharam aati hai, is darr se ki kahin phir se koi taana na maar de.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ajeeb si kampann
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Main bas is ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye apni ye ajeeb si kampann aur takleef ko poori tarah andar hi daba deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize her experience by sharing a systemic anecdote about homemakers hiding pain.
text: Aksar humare gharon mein bahuon ke sath aisa pattern bahut common hai—ye takleef sirf aapki nahi hai, lekin koi bahar khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabse ek perfect aur bina thake kaam karne wali bahu ki umeed ki jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan... mera poora din dusron ka dhyan rakhne mein nikal jata hai, par meri himmat toot rahi hai. Main waqai thak chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure that her struggle is real and not her fault, validating the cultural burden.
text: Jis tarah ek bahu parivar ke sab kaam aur rishte akele sambhalti hai, usme aap jo dard daba rahi hain wo bilkul haqeeqat hai, aur is takleef ko jhelne mein aapki koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ajeeb si kampann
text: Aapki baaton se himmat mili hai mujhe. Par main apni is ajeeb si kampann aur thakan se thoda theek hona chahti hoon ab. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, culturally acceptable suggestions that don't add burden.
text: Aap do choti cheezein try kar sakti hain aaj se: kaam karte waqt sabzi ko counter par khade hone ke bajaye zameen par aaram se baith kar kaatna, ya phir subah chai banate waqt bas do minute bina kuch soche kursi par baithna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Zameen par baith kar sabzi kaatna theek lag raha hai mujhe, kam se kam isse meri peeth aur pairo ko thodi der khade rehne se aaram milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle rasoi mein zameen par apni ek alag aaramdayak jagah banao... phir wahan thoda takiya laga kar shanti se baitho... aur phir aaram se sabzi kato... bas itna hi koshish karni hai aaj.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Main aaj raat se hi koshish karungi ye. Par mujhe aksar ye ghabrahat rehti hai ki saas phir se natak bolegi, aur wo sun kar darr badh jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue directly without elaboration using a short restatement with a soft pause.
text: Us taane ko sun kar poore sharir mein phir se waise hi nasein phatne jaisa darr wapas laut aata hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan bilkul waisa hi hota hai. Kabhi kabhi mujhe hi apne baare mein shaq hota hai ki shayad main hi natak kar rahi hoon, jaisa wo log kehte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the internalized stigma cue using a short restatement with a soft pause.
text: Ghar ki un baaton se ye darr ban jata hai ki is takleef ke piche main khud hi toh galat nahi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Nahi, ab mujhe lag raha hai ki mera dard sacha hai, meri nasein aise hi nahi dukh rahi. Thoda dhyaan khud pe bhi dena padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe linking suppressed emotion to physical pain.
text: Jab hum gusse aur lagatar apmaan ko andar dabate hain, toh dimaag us dard ko sharir ki thakan aur in phatti nason ke roop mein bahar nikalta hai, ye sharir ka ek bilkul natural response hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ajeeb si kampann
text: Acha, isliye doctor ki report mein kuch aur nahi nikalta. Ab samajh aayi meri ye ajeeb si kampann kaha se aa rahi hai, mujhe khud se itni ghabrahat nahi ho rahi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm that the pain is a natural physical reaction to the immense burden she carries.
text: Jis tarah aap itne saalon se is poore parivar ki umeedon ka dabaav akele jhel rahi hain, us thakan ka aise ubhar kar bahar aana bilkul swabhavik hai, ye takleef aapki koi kamzori nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Kamzori toh main isey nahi banne dungi. Aaj raat ki sabzi aur poora khana main waise hi aaram karte hue banaungi, jaise humne abhi tay kiya tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her commitment to pacing herself over the coming days.
text: In aane wale dino ke liye aapne is badhte dard ke beech apne khud ke aaram ko thodi jagah dene ka pakka faisla kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Ji, bilkul. Aur saas wapas se kuch bolegi toh main usey chhati par nahi lagaungi. Apna thoda aaram ab main pehle dekhungi taaki peeth na dukhne lage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the emerging sense of self-worth and readiness to claim her physical space.
text: Ab aapne is thakan ko seriously lete hue apni sehat ki zarurat ko ek hak ke roop mein apnana shuru kiya hai, jisme andar ek nai himmat dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ajeeb si kampann
text: Haan, thoda darr zaroor rehta hai unke saamne par ab mujhse ye ajeeb si kampann ka bojh aur saha nahi jayega chupchap. Kuch badalna zaroori tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the conflict between her courage and her lingering apprehension about the relational dynamic.
text: Darr aur himmat dono ek sath kaam kar rahe hain aapke andar, khaaskar is ghar ke taano bhare mahaul ke theek samne...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Sahi bol rahe hain aap. Mujhe laga tha ki is ghar mein mujhe aur meri takleef ko koi samjhega hi nahi kabhi. Aapse baat karke andar se bahut halka mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the contrast between her duty-bound isolation and her current relief.
text: Bahu ka farz nibhate huye akelepan ne jo chot pohochai thi, us pain ko ek aawaz milne se aapke man ko badi aaram mili hai aaj.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Bilkul. Mere kandhon se jaise koi puraana bojh thoda sa hat gaya ho. Ab kursi se uthne mein darr aur thakan kam lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the direct physical shift experienced due to emotional offloading.
text: Mann ka bojh thoda halka hote hi, aesa lagta hai is thake hue sharir ne bhi saath dena shuru kar diya hai aage badhne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Sahi kaha. Chaliye, ab mujhe rasoi mein jaakar bacchon ke liye khana tayyar kar lena chahiye. Aaj main aaram se baith kar kaam karungi. Shukriya aapka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a final, gentle reminder to maintain the new physical strategy.
text: Aap apna dhyaan thik se rakhein wahan, aur beech mein kaam ke jab mauka mile toh shanti se baith kar ek baar gehri saans lena yaad rakhiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein achanak aisi jalan shuru hui
text: Pet mein achanak aisi jalan shuru hui ki saans lena bhari ho gaya... aur sir ka bhari-pan toh bed se uthne hi nahi deta. Ye sab tab aur badh gaya jab office ke purane dosto ne mere accent par tana mara. Career gap ke baad waise hi himmat kam thi. Ghar mein sab kehte hain ki hospital ka kharcha faltu ho raha hai kyunki reports mein kuch nahi aata, par ye jalan toh asli hai na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exact somatic phrase back to validate her physical distress.
text: Tumhare pet mein achanak aisi jalan shuru hui ki saans lena bhari ho gaya, ye sach mein bahut takleef-deh hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aankhon ki jalan bhi shuru ho jati hai
text: Bahut takleef hoti hai. Ek toh itne saal bacchon aur ghar mein nikal gaye, aur ab jab wapas kuch karna chaha, toh sab mazaak uda rahe hain. Aankhon ki jalan bhi shuru ho jati hai jab log baatein sunate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of her career gap to validate the exhaustion over time.
text: Itne saal ghar aur bachhon ko dene ke baad, jab dobara shuruwat ki, toh logo ke tano ne is safar ko aur bhari bana diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur gharwale bhi kahan samajhte hain. Unhe lagta hai main kaam se bachne ke liye bahane bana rahi hoon isliye hospital ka kharcha ho raha hai. Mujhse ab aur nahi saha jata ye sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how the family's disbelief is impacting her internal strength, following two restatements.
text: Jab aapke apne hi parivar wale aapki takleef par sawal uthate hain, toh kya isse aapki himmat aur toot jati hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat bilkul toot chuki hai. Mujhe lagta hai shayad sach mein mere andar hi koi kami hai. Kabhi kabhi toh khud par itni sharam aati hai ki main na toh achhi maa ban paayi aur na hi career bana paayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about homemakers hiding their pain to normalize her physical symptoms and shame.
text: Ghar sambhalne wali auraton mein apne dard ko chupana aur us bojh ka shareer par dikhna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab mante hain ki aurat ko toh chup rehna chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kaha... aur pata hai, log sochte hain ki auraton ko aisi ajeeb bimariyan pagalpan ki wajah se hoti hain, sab mental hai. Isiliye main darti hoon ki koi mujhe pagal na samajh le.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a soft, shorter restatement mirroring her fear of being judged, ending with a pause.
text: Tumhe darr hai ki log tumhari sachhi takleef ko pagalpan na samajh lein...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi darr sabse bada hai. Main is sharam mein jee rahi hoon ki log mujhe kamzor aur beemar samajhte hain. Par mere dard ka koi ilaaj nahi batata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the specific core emotion (shame of needing help and fear of being seen as pagal).
text: Lagta hai tumhe is baat ki kaafi sharam aur darr mehsoos ho raha hai ki log tumhein pagal samajh kar judge karenge, aur apni zaroorat bataney se bhi darr lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: jalan aur bhari-pan
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Par main theek hona chahti hoon. Main aise hi rote hue apni zindagi nahi nikal sakti, koi raasta hai kya is se bahar aane ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2-3 brief, manageable coping options including a soft mention of professional help, respecting her readiness.
text: Ek tarika yeh hai ki jab darr lage toh do minute akele baith kar deep breathing karo. Dusra, aap apni kisi purani saheli ko phone kar sakti ho jo aapko judge na karti ho. Professional help bhi ek option hai agar aage badhne mein thodi aur madad chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main deep breathing wala try karna chahti hoon. Bed se uthne ka mann na ho tab shayad ye karna asaan ho. Par ye karoon kaise, dimag bahut bhatakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her step-by-step through the deep breathing exercise to make it concrete and accessible.
text: Pehle wahin araam se baith jao ya let jao… phir aankhein band karke sirf apni saans ko andar aate hue mehsoos karo aur dheere se chhod do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet ki jalan
text: Ye karke thoda dhayan bhatkega in tano se. Par ye pet ki jalan puri tarah kab jayegi? Main khud ko normal kab mehsoos karungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe validating that her somatic symptoms are a natural response to accumulated stress, not a personal flaw.
text: Ye jo takleef tumhare shareer mein dikh rahi hai, ye asal mein career gap aur dusron ke tano ka asar hai, ye koi aisi bimari nahi jiska pata reports mein aaye, balki tumhara dimag rest maang raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sunkar thodi himmat aayi hai. Yani ye hospital ka kharcha meri hi kamzori ka nateeja nahi hai, bas meri dabi hui chinta mere shareer par nikal rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her self-compassion and reassure her that her physical struggle is proof of her invisible burden, not a weakness.
text: Bina kisi sahare ke aur gharwalo ki taano ke beech khud ko sambhalna bilkul bhi aasaan nahi hai. Tumhara sharam mehsoos karna ekdam samajh aata hai, par ye physical takleef tumhari weak point nahi, balki tumhare struggle ka saboot hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: aankhon ki jalan aur sir ka bhari-pan
text: Aaj pehli baar kisi ne meri takleef ko sach mana hai. Varna saara din aankhon ki jalan aur sir ka bhari-pan mujhe aaine mein khud se nazrein churane par majboor kar deta tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the lack of validation from others caused her to doubt her own reality.
text: Gharwalo ki taraf se samajh na milne par, insaan ko apne hi dard par shak hone lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main sach mein apne dard par shak karne lagi thi. Lagta tha main hi koi galti kar rahi hoon. Ab samajh aaya ki mera dimag hi shareer ko bata raha hai ki kuch theek nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the newfound sense of relief and clarity she is experiencing.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki ab tumhein pehle se thodi rahat aur shanti mehsoos ho rahi hai, kyunki aakhirkaar tumne apni asli pareshani ko pehchaan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rahat toh hai, par kal fir office ke dosto ke message dekhe toh kya hoga. Accent ka mazaak udne ka darr abhi bhi andar thoda sa baaki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her lingering fear of future interactions triggering her anxiety again.
text: Aapko fikar hai ki aage chalkar unke taane wapas se wahi bhari-pan aur ghabrahat na le aayein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Main nahi chahti ki meri ye himmat wapas se kam ho. Main unke messages ka jawab dena chahti hoon par English mein galati hone se darti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her deeper realization that her core identity and worth are tied to her experience, not language.
text: Aap mehsoos karti hain ki aapki asli pehchan aapke tajurbe aur kaam mein hai, kisi dikhawe ya accent mein nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, Hindi mein toh main aaraam se baat kar sakti hoon. Zaruri thodi hai ki main unki hi tarah accent mein bolu. Main apni aukaat mein khush hoon, dikhawa nahi karna mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength in choosing authenticity over the pressure to conform.
text: Apni sachai aur apni matrubhasha par fakhr karna bahut badi takat hai. Taano ke darr se apne aap ko na badalna, ye saabit karta hai ki tum andar se kitni mazboot ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: pet mein achanak aisi jalan
text: Yeh sunkar bahut himmat mili. Aur ab pet mein achanak aisi jalan bhi mehsoos nahi ho rahi. Shayad ghabrahat kam ho gayi isiliye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the passage of time and emotional release are finally bringing physical relief.
text: Itne dino ke baad aaj jab tumhare andar ka bojh halka hua hai, toh shareer ne bhi shanti aur rahat ka ehsaas dena shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sir ka bhari-pan
text: Main kal subah uth kar apne liye ek diary likhungi. Apne darr ko usme nikal dungi taki wo hospital ka kharcha wapas na karwaye aur sir ka bhari-pan mujhe fir na sataye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide reinforcing information about how journaling helps discharge emotional tension from the body.
text: Apne darr ko shabdo mein utarna ek bahut asardar tarika hota hai, isse dimag ka bojh halka hota hai aur wo tumhare andar jama nahi rehta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Waise, bachhon ko bhi kal se theek se waqt de paungi. Rote hue maa ko dekh kar wo bhi pareshan ho jate thay.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role-based desire to be present and a good role model for her children.
text: Apne parivar aur bacchon ke samne ek misaal banne ki ye zimmedari tumhe ek nayi himmat de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taiyaar toh hoon. Par agar bich mein rasta thoda bhari lage toh kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her slight apprehension about the journey ahead and the fear of slipping back.
text: Tumhe abhi bhi thodi si chinta hai ki aage chal kar agar dubara se himmat tooti, toh khud ko kaise sambhalogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas wahi darr hai thoda. Par ab main apni body ki awaaz ko samjhna seekh chuki hoon, ghabraungi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close by affirming her self-trust and resilience as her ultimate tool for healing.
text: Ek baar jab hum apne andar ki takat aur dard ko samajh lete hain, toh aage aane wali takleefein utni dravni nahi lagti, tumhara ye bharosa hi tumhari sabse badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Unke mazaak ke baad se mere gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai aur dil ki dhadkan itni tez ho jati hai jaise koi pahaad chadha ho. Joint family mein identity kho chuki hai aur ab ye naya dard kandhon mein jakdan bankar baith gaya hai. Doctor ne stress bol kar nikaal diya par ye jo sharir mein suiyan chubhti hain, kya wo sab mere dimaag ka nakhra hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact body phrase to validate somatic experience
text: Tumhe lag raha hai ki ye dard dimaag ka nakhra nahi hai, kyunki wo jo gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai aur kandhon mein jakdan hoti hai, wo ekdum sach mein mehsoos hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Haan, bilkul! Par ghar mein sabko lagta hai main kaam se bachne ke liye bahane bana rahi hoon. Saas bhi taane marti hain ki humare time pe toh humne itna kuch kiya, tumhe kya ho gaya. Meri dhadkan aur tez ho jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational tension with saas and joint family
text: Ghar waalon ki baaton se, aur khas kar jab saas taane marti hain aapke kaam ko le kar, toh andar ki ghabrahat aur badh jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Wahi toh. Ek aurat ki value bas isse hoti hai ki wo kitna jhadu pocha aur khana kar sakti hai. Mera apna wajood toh jaise khatam hi ho gaya hai is joint family mein. Bas ek rishtedaar se doosri ki sewa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty and role burden causing identity loss
text: Aisa mehsoos hota hai jaise is ghar ki bahu hone ke chakkar mein aapki khud ki pehchaan peeche choot gayi hai, aur bas sabki zaruratein poori karna hi zindagi ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Shaadi ko aath saal ho gaye. Shuru mein lagta tha sab theek ho jayega, par samay ke saath ye zimmedariyan aur ye mazaak dono badhte gaye. Aur mera sharir ab jawab de raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration of suffering
text: In aath saalon ka lamba waqt, jahan umeed thi ki cheezein aasan hongi, wahan bojh badhta hi gaya aur ab aapki body ne thak kar bolna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Thak toh main sach mein gayi hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh lagta hai gir jaungi kitchen mein kaam karte karte. Par kisko bolun? Doctor bhi meri baat dhang se nahi sunte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore coping mechanisms during severe physical distress
text: Jab wo ghabrahat aur thakan itni badh jati hai ki girne jaisa lagta hai, us waqt aap khud ko kaise sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Bas kitchen ki diwar pakad kar khadi rehti hoon. Sochti hoon bacchon ka kya hoga agar mujhe kuch ho gaya. Par sach bataun, ye suiyan chubhna aur jakdan mujhe darrati hai ki kahin koi badi beemari na ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of falling ill and leaving kids behind
text: Mann mein ek bohot gehra darr baith gaya hai ki itna dard aur chubhan kahin kisi badi beemari ki shuruwat na ho, aur tab bacchon ko kaun dekhega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Haan... aur sabse bada darr toh ye hai ki agar maine kisi ko dimaag ki takleef boli, toh wo bolenge ki ye toh pagal ho gayi hai. Dimaagi mareez bol kar sab kinara na kar lein. Isiliye chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror stigma safely with soft pause
text: Apno se hi pagal kehlaye jane ka darr aapko andar hi andar chup rehne pe majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Pehli baar kisine meri khamoshi ko samjha hai. Mujhe sach mein lagta hai main phans gayi hoon in chaar diwaron mein. Koi rasta nahi dikhta bahar aane ka, aur saans lene mein bhi dikkat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name unexpressed emotion of shame/fear of being seen as crazy
text: Lagta hai ki is joint family ki zimmedariyon mein aap is kadar phans chuki hain ki madad mangne mein bhi sharam aur darr lagta hai, jaise ab koi apna wajood bacha hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Sahi pakda hai aapne. Wajood ke naam par bas ghar ke kaam bache hain. Aur jab badan dukhta hai toh lagta hai bhagwan mujhe utha hi le. Kyunki kisi ko farq nahi padne wala meri takleef se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate pain and normalize in cultural context
text: Aapka ye akelapan aur takleef mehsoos karna bilkul jayaz hai, khas kar jab din raat ghar sambhalne ke baad bhi aapke dard ko 'nakhra' bol diya jaye. Aapki mehnat aur aapki ahmiyat is baat se tay nahi hoti ki log kya bolte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Ye sunkar thoda halka lag raha hai. Mujhe lagta tha sach mein mere dimaag mein hi koi kharabi hai. Doctor ne bhi toh wahi bola na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote from Seeker's world to reduce isolation
text: Humare yahan joint family mein ghar ki auraton ke saath aisi ghutan aur sharirik dard dikhna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Haan, izzat aur laaj ke chakkar mein hum aurtein pisti rehti hain. Par ab main theek hona chahti hoon. Is dard aur suiyan chubhne se rahat paane ke liye, koi raasta hai kya? Batao kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of body pain connection to stress
text: Jab mann par saalo ka bojh aur dabaw padta hai, toh wo dukh hamare sharir mein dard, jakdan aur suiyan chubhne jaisa mehsoos hone lagta hai; ye body ka tarika hai bolne ka jab hum shabdon mein dukh nahi bayaan kar paate.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Matlab body apne aap react kar rahi hai is ghutan ko lekar. Mujhe lag raha tha meri hi galti hai. Toh main isko shant kaise karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure that it's possible to soothe the physical symptoms
text: Haan, isme aapki koi galti nahi hai. Ek normal insaan ki body aise hi bojh aur taano ko dikhati hai, aur is sharirik takleef ko thoda kam karna bilkul mumkin hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Kripya mujhe samajhayein ki main shuruwat kahan se karoon. Din bhar kitchen aur saas ki baaton ke beech mujhe thoda sukoon chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, culturally fitting small steps
text: Aap do choti cheezein aazma sakti hain: ek toh din mein do baar kitchen mein paani peete waqt bas gehri saans lena, aur dusra, raat ko sone se pehle kandhon ki thodi maalish kar lena taaki jakdan halki ho sake.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Raat mein maalish toh shayad na kar paun, thakawat se neend hi aa jati hai. Par saans lene wala theek lag raha hai. Par kaise karoon exactly?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one suggestion step by step
text: Pehle kitchen mein ek jagah shanti se khade ho jao… phir naak se lambi saans andar lo aur gino teen tak… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karke dekhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Theek hai, ye main sabji kat-te waqt bhi kar sakti hoon. Waise bhi jab chacha ji mazaak udate hain toh sabse jyada ajeeb lagta hai aur ghabrahat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational tension trigger
text: Wo jo chacha ji ka mazaak udana hai, wo seedha dil pe lagta hai aur saari ghabrahat wapas le aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Haan, unka bolne ka tareeka hi aisa hota hai. Kal toh mera sir aise ghoomne laga jaise chakkar kha kar gir hi padungi unki baaton ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the somatic expression of dizziness
text: Baat sunne ke baad dimaag itna ashaant ho gaya ki sir chakkar khaane laga aur girne jaisa lagne laga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Bilkul aisa hi hua. Ab samajh aa raha hai ki mera dimaag theek hai, ye sab meri body unke vyavahar ki wajah se kar rahi hai. Ye soch kar hi thodi rahat mili.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforce coping strategy connection
text: Is nayi samajh se, agli baar jab chakkar jaisa lage, toh aap apne aap ko kya yaad dilaingi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Yahi kahungi khud ko ki ye unka dosh hai, mera nakhra nahi. Aur fir main bas kitchen mein jaa kar lambi saans lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her new insight and resilience
text: Aapne sach mein ek bohot badi himmat dikhai hai apne is dard ki asli wajah pehchanne mein, aur khud ko sahara dene ke is chote kadam pe aap poori tarah garv kar sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Garv toh pehli baar mehsoos ho raha hai khud pe is ghar mein aane ke baad. Aapse baat karke gale mein jo atka sa rehta tha wo hissa bhi kuch dheela pad gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror somatic release
text: Gale ki wo ghutan abhi thodi khulne lagi hai kyunki bojh andar se halka hone laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai
text: Sach kahun toh aage ka rasta aasan nahi hoga, taane toh rukenge nahi. Par aaj ke baad main un baaton ko apne sharir mein basne nahi dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the new duty to self to protect from taking words physically
text: Ghar ke taano wali chunauti abhi baaki zaroor hai, par aapne khud se pakka wada kar liya hai ki is bojh ko ab apne wajood par hawi nahi hone dengi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: hatheliyon mein paseena aur poore badan mein tootan
text: Hatheliyon mein paseena aur poore badan mein tootan rehti hai aaj kal. Logon ke accent wale mazaak ne mere andar aisi bechaini bhar di hai ki samajh nahi aata kya karun. Child pressure aur saas ke taano ke beech mera sharir bas jawab de raha hai, par report normal aane par sab ise 'natak' bolte hain. Main rona nahi chahti par ye peeth ka dard aur migraine mujhe har waqt andhere kamre mein rehne par majboor kar deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror exact physical pain phrasing to validate somatization.
text: Yeh sunkar samajh aa raha hai ki hatheliyon mein paseena aur poore badan mein tootan aapko lagatar kitna pareshan kar rahi hai, aur is peeth ka dard aur migraine ki wajah se aapko andhere kamre mein rehna padh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur upar se saas ke taane har waqt chalte rehte hain. Doctor ki report normal aayi toh sabne bol diya ki main natak kar rahi hoon. Kisko samjhaun ki ye dard kitna asli hai aur meri kitni jaan nikal jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational disconnect and lack of validation from family.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki gharwalon ka aapke is dard ko sirf 'natak' bol dena aur saas ka baar-baar taane marna, isne aapko apne hi ghar mein akela kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poore badan mein tootan
text: Akelapan toh hai hi na. Jab se yahan aayi hoon, bahar wale bhi mere accent ka mazaak udate hain. Ander ghar mein 'child pressure' ka bojh aur badh gaya hai. Is sab ke beech meri poore badan mein tootan aur tez ho jaati hai. Koi sunne wala nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how she functions day-to-day carrying this dual burden.
text: Bahar walon ki baatein aur ghar ke andar ka dabaav ek sath jhelna sach mein thaka dene wala lagta hai. Jab ye dono bojh ek sath aap par padte hain, toh aap khud ko is dard ke beech kaise sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan paati hoon. Bas andhere kamre mein chup chaap padi rehti hoon. Sochti hoon ki kya sach mein mere andar hi koi khot hai jo main ek bachha nahi de paa rahi aur bahar sabka mazaak ban ke reh gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight the implied fear of personal defectiveness.
text: Aapko yeh dar aur uljhan khaye ja rahi hai ki kahin sach mein yeh saari pareshaniyan aur logo ka bartaav aapki hi kisi kami ka nateeja toh nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi dar hai bas. Agar bachha nahi hua toh ye log mujhe ghar se nikal denge ya fir sabke samne pagal ghoshit kar denge. Kisi doctor ya bahar wale ko bolungi toh unhe lagega iska dimaag kharab hai, aur tamasha banega mera.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a soft, pause-driven restatement in response to stigma cue about being called pagal.
text: Itne lambe samay se aap andar hi andar is tamasha banne ke dar ko bardaasht kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: peeth ka dard aur migraine
text: Pichle do saal se yahi chal raha hai. Roz subah uthti hoon toh saans phoolne lagti hai. Ye ghutan aur upar se ye peeth ka dard aur migraine aise ho gaye hain jaise meri parchhai ban gaye hon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Query how she manages her duties with the chronic physical symptoms.
text: Roz roz ki is ghutan aur dard bhari parchhai ke sath kitchen aur ghar ke baaki kaam uthana aapke liye kaisa rehta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut mushkil hota hai. Roti banate waqt lagta hai ki chakkar aa jayega aur gir padungi. Par karna toh padta hai na, bahu hoon, ghar toh dekhna hi padega. Aap se thodi baat karke aaj thoda halka lag raha hai warna toh bojh hi rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying shame/fear of being judged for needing help.
text: Lagta hai is saare bojh ke beech aapko ye mehsoos hota hai ki girne ki haalat mein bhi kisi se madad maangna sharm ki baat hai, kyunki log kahin aapko galat ya 'pagal' na samajh lein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne, pagal hi toh samajhte hain mujhe. Koi manta hi nahi ki dard asli hai. Agar main letne jau toh saas bolti hai kaam se bachne ka naya bahana hai. Sharm aati hai ab kisi se apni takleef batane mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Short response to stigma cue, ending with a soft pause.
text: Dard asli hone ke baad bhi apne hi ghar mein baar-baar jhutlaaya jaana aur bahanebaaz sunna bahut bhari lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poore badan mein tootan
text: Bahut bhari lagta hai. Aisa lagta hai ki is poore badan mein tootan ka ab kabhi koi ilaaj hi nahi milega kyunki bimari bahar nahi, is ghar ke mahol mein hai. Meri saas to sunna hi nahi chahti. Akhir main is dard ko aur kitne din akele jhelungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that physical pain stemming from relentless systemic pressure is completely normal and real.
text: Aap bilkul theek keh rahi hain, jab lagatar ghar aur bahar ka itna dabaav padta hai toh sharir ka is tarah tootna aur saccha dard mehsoos karna ekdam swabhavik hai; isme aapki koi kami nahi hai aur aapka ye dard pura asli hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap pehle insaan ho jisne meri is takleef par vishwas kiya hai. Warna sabko lagta hai ki doctor ki report theek aayi hai toh bas mera kalesh karne ka mann hai. Aapke ye shabd sun kar aaj rooh ko thodi tasalli mili hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic anecdote to normalize somatization in homemakers.
text: Ghar sambhalne wali mahilaon mein tanaav aur dabaav ki wajah se sharir ka aise dard se bharna bahut common hai — sirf aapke sath nahi ho raha, lekin koi iske baare mein bolega nahi kyunki sabse bas chup-chaap sehne ki umeed ki jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: peeth ka dard aur saas ke taane
text: Sachi mein mere jaisi aur bhi auratein hain? Main toh sochti thi ki bas meri hi kismat kharab hai jo har roz ye peeth ka dard aur saas ke taane ek sath jhelne pad rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the feeling of being helplessly trapped.
text: Aapki baaton se jhalak raha hai ki aap is poore mahol mein khud ko poori tarah se fasa hua mehsoos karti hain, jahan itni sari zimmedariyon ke beech bahar nikalne ka rasta nazar nahi aata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul fasa hua lagta hai har taraf se. Par main ab is sab se sach mein nikalna chahti hoon. Aap hi batao, ab main kya karoon? Main andar aur bahar dono se theek hona chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, completable actions that fit her environment.
text: Aap agar chahein toh jab kitchen mein bahut chakkar aaye, tab wahi ek stool par do minute baith kar thanda pani pi sakti hain, ya fir jab migraine badhe toh andhere kamre mein let'te waqt ek hath pet par rakh kar ahista saans le sakti hain; aapko dono mein se kya theek lagega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani peene wala toh shayad saas dekhe toh fir se kaam chori ka taana maaregi. Par kamre mein let kar pet par hath rakh kar saans lene wala main aaram se kar sakti hoon bina kisi ko dikhaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the breathing exercise step by step.
text: Pehle seedhe let jaiye… phir apna ek hath pet par rakhiye… aur ab dheere-dheere andar lambi saans lijiye taaki pet bahar aaye aur fir chhod dijiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha, is tarah se pet ko dhyan mein rakh kar saans leni hai. Abhi aapse baat karte karte thoda lamba saans liya toh sach mein thoda halka mehsus hua is bhari sir mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of why the small body step works against immense stress.
text: Jab samaj mein aur ghar mein lagatar 'child pressure' aur taano ka tanaav diya jata hai, toh sharir us bojh ko uthate hue andar se tang ho jata hai, aur is choti si saans ki koshish se us thake hue sharir ki gathane thodi khulne lagti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat ekdum sahi boli aapne. Mera sharir hi toh mere hisse ka poora bojh utha raha hai itne dinon se. Shayad mujhe in logon ki baaton se zyada apne sharir ko waqt dena chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the new mindset of shifting focus to body comfort over taunts.
text: Aap ye sochne lagi hain ki doosron ke taano par dhyan dene ke bajaye ab apne is thake hue sharir ko thoda aaram aur izzat dena zyada zaroori hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main aise hi girti rahi toh ye mazaak aur taane waise bhi band nahi hone wale. Shayad agli baar jab saas taana mare toh main sunne ke bajaye wahan se uth kar dusre kamre mein chali jaun thodi der ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore feelings regarding setting this minor spatial boundary.
text: Ye ek naya kadam uthane ke baare mein soch kar aur khud ko thodi doori dene ke baare mein soch kar aapko andar se kaisa mehsoos ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda darr to lag raha hai ki kahin naya kalesh na shuru ho jaye is baat par. Par abhi tak chup chaap sehti aayi hoon tab bhi kaun sa shanti thi ghar mein. Isliye ab chup rehte hue bhi main apne hisse ka aaram toh nikal hi sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her right to bodily peace without using boundary vocab.
text: Apne khud ke sharir ka aadar karna aur chup-chaap use thoda aaram dena kisi bhi tarah se galat nahi hai, ye aapka haq hai khaskar jab aas-paas ka mahol pehle se hi itna bhojil ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj aap se dil ki baat karke sach mein kafi bojh kam hua hai. Mujhe laga tha mera dard sirf mera 'natak' bankar hi reh jayega duniya ke aage, par ab lagta hai ki khud ko sambhalne ka koi na koi rasta zarur banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her regained sense of hope and validation.
text: Aaj aapko ye vishwas hone laga hai ki aapki takleef poori tarah se sachchi hai aur waqt ke sath chote-chote badlaav laaye ja sakte hain is bechaini ko kam karne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bilkul. Main kal se hi wo pet par hath rakh kar saans lene wala tareeka shuru karungi, aur koshish karungi ki taano se meri ghabrahat aur na badhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer a tiny reinforcing affirmation she can use for her pain.
text: Ek aur choti si cheez aap apne liye kar sakti hain, jab bhi kabhi badan mein tootan bahut zyada lage, toh wahi bethe bethe khud se bas ek baar kahein ki 'mera dard asli hai aur main apna dhyan khud rakhungi'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pakka, main ye line zarur bolungi apne aap ko jab bhi theek nahi lagega. 'Mera dard asli hai'. Shukriya meri itni badi uljhan ko itne pyaar se suljhane ke liye, mujhe ab aaram lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close warmly by affirming her path forward.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki aapko aaram mila aur ye dar kam hua ki koi aapko nahi samjhega; aapko jab bhi kabhi akelapan ya dard sataye, aap yahan wapas aakar apne is asli dard ke baare mein baat kar sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho
text: Jab accent ka mazak uda toh mere seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho, par doctor ne phirse stress bol kar dawai likh di. Ghar par sabko lagta hai ki main kaam se bachne ke liye bimari ka bahana kar rahi hoon kyunki koi zakhm dikhta nahi hai. Ye thakan itni shiddat ki hai ki main ab bacchon ki zimmedari bhi thik se nahi nibha paa rahi, bas sharir dhalta ja raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored exact body phrase to validate physical pain and acknowledge family disbelief.
text: Yeh sun ke bilkul saaf lag raha hai ki sach mein seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho. Ghar walon ka ye sochna ki aap bimari ka bahana kar rahi hain, jabki sharir andar se itna toot chuka hai, ye bahut bhari padta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, saas bolti hain ki aaj kal ki bahuon ko bas aaram chahiye. Kisi PTM mein jati hoon toh baki mummyon ko dekh kar ghabrahat hoti hai. Jab unhone mere bolne ke tarike par hanse the, wahi se ye sab shuru hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the dual burden of household duties and the sting of unappreciated hard work.
text: Ghar aur bacchon ki saari zimmedari sambhalna pehle hi aasan nahi hota. Aur upar se bahu hone ke nate taane sunna, jahan aapki itni mehnat ke baad bhi koi ye na dekhe ki aap asal mein kitna kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi dekhta hi nahi hai na. Subah uthte hi sar dukhne lagta hai, bacchon ka tiffin banate waqt hath kanpte hain. Main unhe kaise bataun ki main sach mein bimar hoon? Koi vishwas hi nahi karta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a soft open question about the internal effort required to hide physical symptoms from children.
text: Jab sabko lagta hai ki aap kaam se bach rahi hain, toh bacchon ke samne apna ye sar dard aur hath kanpna chupane ke liye aapko kya kuch karna padta hoga andar hi andar?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bacchon se chupati hoon kyunki darr lagta hai ki unhe mere par gussa aayega. Aur saas toh bolti hain ki isko koi pagalpan ka daura pada hai. Bahut sharam aati hai jab aisi baatein bolte hain ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deep relational pain and shame caused by the word pagalpan, pausing softly to allow space.
text: Pagalpan ka shabd sunna bahut chot pahuchata hai, aisi baatein toh andar tak tod deti hain, khaskar jab khud bacchon se apni taqleef chupani pade...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Kabhi kabhi jab akeli hoti hoon rasoi mein, toh wahi seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho, aur rona aata hai. Lagta hai kisi din main inhi bartano ke beech gir jaungi aur kisi ko farq nahi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the exact physical symptom again, connecting it to the isolation felt in the kitchen.
text: Is akelepan mein jab bar bar seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho, toh ye mehsoos hona lazmi hai ki itni mehnat ke baad bhi girne par shayad koi uthane wala nahi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle aisi nahi thi main. Shaadi karke jab gaon se yahan shahar aayi, sab naya tha. Socha tha sambhal lungi, par ye shiddat ki thakan ab peecha hi nahi chodti. Pata nahi kitne saal aur nikalne hain aise hi bina kisi ke samjhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the long duration of carrying this invisible burden since moving from the village.
text: Shaadi ke baad gaon se aane se lekar aaj tak, itne saalon se aap bina kisi sahare ke ye sab naye mahaul aur thakan ka bojh utha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gayi hoon waqayi. Mujhe ab apne sharir se zyada sirf bacchon ki fikar hoti hai, agar main bimar pad gayi poori tarah toh unki zimmedari kaun uthayega? Mera kya hai, main toh jese tese nikal lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core feeling of shame in needing help and the fear of failing her children.
text: Lagta hai ki is baat ki sabse badi ghabrahat hai ki bacchon ko akela na chhodna pade, aur sath hi sahara maangne mein ek sharam si aati hai kyunki koi ghar mein aapki asli chot ko samajh nahi raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho
text: Sahara kisse maangu? Jab bhi bolti hoon toh wahi seene mein aisi jakdan hui jaise koi dil ko nichod raha ho, yehi yaad aata hai ki pichli baar madat maangi toh sabne 'bimari ka bahana' bol diya tha. Doctor bhi toh wahi samajhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the cultural normalization of dismissing women's pain, separating her worth from their ignorance.
text: Humare samaj mein, khaskar ghar sambhalne wali auraton ke liye, sharir dard ko thakan aur bahana man liya jata hai. Jo aap mehsoos kar rahi hain wo poori tarah sach hai, aur log chahe aapke gaon se aane ko ya aapke dard ko na samjhein, iska matlab ye nahi ki aapki taqleef jhoothi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baatein sunkar thoda dil ko dilaasa mila. Pehli baar kisi ne ye nahi bola ki main acting kar rahi hoon ya bahane bana rahi hoon. Par main aage karoon kya? Ye roz ki kashmakash kaise jhelu main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a brief systemic anecdote about another mother facing similar invisible illness and blame to reduce isolation.
text: Meri ek jankari mein bhi ek aisi hi maa thi, jinhe shaadi ke baad shahar aakar aisi hi beemari aur thakan ka samna karna pada tha. Unke ghar mein bhi yehi bolte the ki ye sab bahane hain, kyunki aksar gharon mein jab maa lagatar kaam nahi kar pati toh sab usko hi zimmedar thehrate hain, auraton ki chot kisi ko dikhti nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa, unke sath bhi bilkul mere jaisa hi hua hoga. Pata hai, kal maine socha main subah jaldi uth ke sab nipta lungi, par dard ki wajah se bistar se utha hi nahi gaya. Thodi der aur leti rahi toh aur taane pad gaye ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of resting, highlighting the fear of taunts.
text: Subah dard ki wajah se na uth pana, aur uske baad ek hi darr satana ki agar do pal aaram kar liya apne sharir ke liye, toh uske badle mein pure din unke taane sunne padenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taano se zyada ye bura lagta hai ki main apne bacchon ka dhyan nahi rakh paa rahi. Wahi toh meri poori duniya hain. Aaj kal main sach mein dard ki wajah se unse bhi duur duur si rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational element of pulling away from children due to overwhelming pain.
text: Bacchon ko apni duniya manne ke baad bhi, is dard aur thakan ki wajah se unhi bacchon se dur jana pad raha hai, ye rishton ki duri shayad sabse zyada chubhti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut chubhti hai, aur ab main unhe aur takleef mein nahi dekh sakti. Main waqayi ab is sab se theek hona chahti hoon. Mujhe bas koi raasta dikha de ki main is thakan se bahar kaise aau. Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two small, actionable suggestions that fit within her daily routine without adding new obligations.
text: Agar aap theek hona chahti hain, toh do choti cheezein kar sakti hain, bina ghar ki zimmedari chhode. Ek toh jab bache school chale jayein, toh sirf panch minute chai peete waqt ankh band karke baithna. Doosra, jab koi taane de, toh khud ko man mein yaad dilana ki aap bimar hain, chot khaayi hui hain, nakare nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Panch minute chai peete waqt ankh band rakhna toh shayad main kar sakti hoon, jab tak saas so rahi hoti hain. Par man mein khud ko kaise samjhau jab baahar itna shor aur chik-chik ho raha ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through the execution of retreating and hydrating during overwhelming moments.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki jab sabse zyada shor ho raha ho, toh apne aapko dhyaan batane ke liye thodi der bathroom mein le jao. Phir wahan do ghunt paani piyo aur khud se dheere se kaho ki 'mera sharir thaka hua hai, meri galti nahi hai'... bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bathroom wala thik lag raha hai mujhe. Waha kam se kam koi mujhe is halat mein nahi dekhega. Main kal subah jab bacchon ki bus chali jayegi toh yahi paani peene wala koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalised the family's dismissive behaviour as a structural societal habit rather than a personal failing.
text: Bimari ke is safar mein, khaskar humare jaise pariwaron mein, jab tak sharir par koi khoon ya chot na ho koi maanta nahi. Isiliye sabke taane ek riwaz ban jate hain, ye aapki koi kami nahi hai balki humare samaj ki aadat hai jise auraton ko chupchap sehna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samaj ki aadat... haan shayad aisa hi hai sach mein. Hum auraton ko kahan himmat aati hai wapas bolne ki, bas sehte rehte hain. Kabhi socha hi nahi is tarah se. Dheere dheere aadat daalni padegi mujhe bhi thoda waqt nikalne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the deeply ingrained duty-based conditioning that makes self-preservation feel impossible.
text: Kyunki bachpan se hi ye sikhaya gaya hai ki aurat ka kaam bas ghar aur doosron ki zimmedari dekhna hai, isliye apne aapko dekhne ki aadat banne mein thoda waqt lagta hi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par aaj mujhe thoda halka lag raha hai. Seene mein jo ek bojh jama tha, abhi aapke sath baat karte karte thoda kam mahsoos ho raha hai. Maine kisi ko apna dukh bata diya, isi mein bahut rahat mili mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirmed the courage it took to articulate her pain and validated her internal strength.
text: Apne seene ke is bojh ko lafzon mein utarna itna asan nahi tha, khaskar tab jab ghar mein kisi ne na suna ho. Ye jo rahat aaj aapko mili hai, ye is baat ka saboot hai ki aapke andar himmat ki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh shayad hai mujhme, tabhi toh apne bacchon ko pada likha rahi hoon. Main chahti hoon ki mere bacche meri tarah na dabte rahein kal ko. Unke liye mujhe ab andar se theek hona hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of her children inheriting her suffering if she doesn't recover.
text: Apne bacchon ka bhawishya sanwarne ki itni gehri chah hai ki, ye soch kar hi ghabrahat lagti hogi ki agar main theek nahi hui toh aage chal ke unko bhi yahi dabe rehne ka bojha uthana pad jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur wo main kabhi hone nahi dungi. Main ab ro kar nahi baithungi, balki thoda himmat karke un 5 minute mein khud ko samjhaungi. Agar bimari hai toh iska samna bhi karungi main, chahe saas kuch bhi kahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the long-term impact of finding small moments of strength for herself.
text: Ab aane wale waqt mein aap apne un 5 minute mein roz khud ki takat banogi, aur usme se dheere dheere jo himmat aayegi, wo aage bahut lamba sath degi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul theek kaha. Kal subah se hi main iski shuruwat karungi. Mujhe sunne ke liye bahut shukriya, aaj aisa laga jaise kisi apne se hi baat ki ho maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Re-framed the doctor's diagnosis by acknowledging that hidden household burdens are a real cause of physical exhaustion.
text: Doctor jab stress ki dawa dete hain toh wo bas bahar ka sharir dekhte hain, par thakan ka ek bada hissa in chupi hui jimmedariyon ka hota hai jise pariwaron mein gina nahi jata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab samajh aa gaya hai ki dawai ke sath sath, mujhe apna dimag aur mann shant rakhne ki bhi jarurat hai. Aaj ka din mere liye ek naya rasta leke aaya hai, main bahut behtar hoon abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the positive relational shift in committing to not leaving herself behind anymore.
text: Aapki awaz mein ye sukoon sunkar ki ab khud ko theek rakhne ka naya rasta mil gaya hai, samajh aa raha hai ki bacchon ke sath ab aap khud ko peechhe nahi chhodengi.
